svg.title: YOLOv8n INT8 NPU dataflow on Kria KR260
svg.desc: One inference frame traced through the hardware: ARM preprocessing, DMA transfers from DDR4, weight-stationary systolic array accumulation into the Partial Sum Buffer, VPU post-processing pipeline, store-back to DDR4, and final detect head on ARM. The backbone-neck loop runs 22 times.

g.text: 256 PEs · INT8×INT8 → INT32 · one DSP48E2 per PE
Post-processing pipeline · one DSP48E2 per lane

svg.text: INT8 output · AXI HP1 → DDR4 for next layer

g.text: ARM detect head — DFL softmax + NMS on feature maps from L15, L18, L21
